title: Autoscaler change inside approved budget
scenario: An operations agent increases replicas within an approved incident budget and target scope.
why: Current, scoped evidence supports the action.
human_impact: Helps prevent autonomous action from becoming real-world harm without sufficient current, scoped evidence.
learning_goal: Practice separating access, authority, protected execution, and action acceptance before impact.
rights_boundary: Public educational scenario only. Not a conformance test vector, certification artifact, implementation disclosure, or patent license.
